System.Enable diff wrapping: Ativar quebra de linha do diff

VCS.Move diff viewer down: Mover visualizador de diff para baixo

VCS.Expand all diff viewer folders: Expandir todas as pastas do visualizador de diff
VCS.Collapse diff viewer item: Recolher item do visualizador de diff

VCS.Jump to previous diff hunk: Ir para o trecho anterior do diff
VCS.Jump to next diff file: Ir para o próximo arquivo no diff
VCS.Jump to previous diff file: Ir para o arquivo anterior no diff
VCS.Toggle selected diff file reviewed: Alternar status de revisado do arquivo de diff selecionado
VCS.Switch diff viewer focus: Alternar foco do visualizador de diff
VCS.Toggle diff viewer file tree: Alternar árvore de arquivos do visualizador de diff
VCS.Toggle diff viewer split or unified view: Alternar visualização dividida ou unificada do diff
VCS.Show more diff viewer shortcuts: Mostrar mais atalhos do visualizador de diff
